description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the blueoakinteractive/php-ci:7.1.9 Docker image. Include a before_script that runs composer install --prefer-dist --no-interaction --no-progress, composer global require drush/drush, copies .boi_ci.example.yml to .boi_ci.yml, and runs bin/boi_ci gitlab:init-ci for every job. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a job_test_all job that executes vendor/bin/phpunit tests. In the deploy stage add a job_deploy_packagist job that sends a POST request to Packagist using curl -XPOST -H 'content-type:application/json' "https://packagist.org/api/update-package?username=andyg5000&apiToken=$PACKAGIST_KEY" -d'{"repository":{"url":"https://gitlab.com/blueoakinteractive/boi_ci"}}'.
